mode_selected.description: The execution mode used by effGen.

summary.description: A brief summary of the execution outcome.

output.description: The actual output from the effGen task.

artifacts.description: List of file paths to generated artifacts.

metrics.description: Performance or usage metrics (e.g., token usage).

next_action.description: Suggested next steps for the outer agent.

suggested_skill_update.description: Suggestion for promoting a repeated task to a dedicated skill.
